---
id: change-application-order-using-put
title: "Change application order"
description: "Requires <b>applications.order.edit</b> authority for authenticated user"
sidebar_label: "Change application order"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "put api-method"
info_path: docs/api/eshopReference/hc-oneclick-api-installments
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Change application order"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/financing/v1/applications/{uuid}/order"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Requires <b>applications.order.edit</b> authority for authenticated user

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"uuid","in":"path","description":"uuid","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["order"],"properties":{"order":{"type":"object","properties":{"addresses":{"type":"array","description":"Addresses. Only `BILLING` and `DELIVERY` types are allowed.","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"addressType":{"type":"string","description":"type of the address. Only some of the types are allowed in each context.","enum":["PERMANENT","CONTACT","DELIVERY","BILLING"]},"city":{"type":"string","description":"city"},"name":{"type":"string","description":"name on address"},"streetAddress":{"type":"string","description":"street/city part"},"streetNumber":{"type":"string","description":"street number"},"zip":{"type":"string","description":"postal code"}},"title":"FinancingV1Address"}},"deliveryCarrier":{"type":"object","properties":{"carrierCustom":{"type":"string","description":"for carriers not found in enumeration of customer ID, specify value as text"},"carrierId":{"type":"string","enum":["CZ_POST_HAND","CZ_POST_OFFICE","CZ_POST_OTHER","PPL","DPD","GEIS","IN_TIME","TOP_TRANS","GEBRUDER_WEISS","LOCAL_COURIER","TNT","GLS","HDS_COMFORT","HDS_STANDARD"]}},"title":"FinancingV1DeliveryCarrier"},"deliveryType":{"type":"string","description":"delivery type, for `DELIVERY_CARRIER` type can be further specified by DeliveryCarrier attribute.Typ doruceni. Dopravcem, osobni prevzeti, online doruceni atd.","enum":["DELIVERY_CARRIER","ONLINE","PERSONAL_BRANCH","PERSONAL_BRANCH_WITH_ASSISTANCE","PERSONAL_PARTNER"]},"documents":{"type":"array","description":"attached documents (invoices etc.)","items":{"type":"object","required":["file","type"],"properties":{"description":{"type":"string","description":"File description"},"extraData":{"type":"object","properties":{"variableSymbol":{"type":"string","description":"variable symbol (internal for e-shop)"}},"title":"FinancingV1DocumentExtraData"},"file":{"type":"object","properties":{"content":{"type":"string","description":"File content (Base64 encoded, maximum size of encoded string is 500kB)"},"filename":{"type":"string","description":"file name"},"url":{"type":"string","description":"File URL"}},"title":"FinancingFile"},"type":{"type":"string","description":"Type of the document","enum":["INVOICE","PROFORMA_INVOICE","CREDIT_NOTE","OTHER"]}},"title":"FinancingV1Document"}},"items":{"type":"array","description":"order items","items":{"type":"object","required":["name","totalPrice"],"properties":{"code":{"type":"string","description":"internal code for item (internal to e-shop). Used to better identify the item for future changes","minLength":0,"maxLength":100},"ean":{"type":"string","description":"EAN code","minLength":0,"maxLength":32},"image":{"type":"object","properties":{"content":{"type":"string","description":"File content (Base64 encoded, maximum size of encoded string is 500kB)"},"filename":{"type":"string","description":"file name"},"url":{"type":"string","description":"File URL"}},"title":"FinancingFile"},"name":{"type":"string","description":"item name"},"producer":{"type":"string"},"quantity":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"Item quantity"},"totalPrice":{"type":"object","required":["amount","currency"],"properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in decimal format"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency. ISO 4217"}},"title":"FinancingV1Amount"},"type":{"type":"string","description":"item type","enum":["DIGITAL","DISCOUNT","FEE","GIFT_CARD","INSURANCE","PHYSICAL","SALES_TAX","SHIPPING_FEE","STORE_CREDIT"]},"unitPrice":{"type":"object","required":["amount","currency"],"properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in decimal format"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency. ISO 4217"}},"title":"FinancingV1Amount"}},"title":"FinancingV1ApplicationRequestOrderItem"}},"number":{"type":"string","description":"order number (internal for e-shop)"},"reservationDate":{"type":"string","format":"date-time","description":"Date and time until order is reserved. After this date, e-shop does not guarantee items availability (if application processing is longer, it may endanger order fullfillment)."},"totalPrice":{"type":"object","required":["amount","currency"],"properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in decimal format"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency. ISO 4217"}},"title":"FinancingV1Amount"},"variableSymbols":{"type":"array","description":"variable symbols (internal for e-shop)","items":{"type":"string"}}},"title":"FinancingV1OrderChange"},"reason":{"type":"string","description":"Reason of change"}},"title":"FinancingV1OrderChangeRequest"}}},"description":"request","required":true}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"OK","content":{"*/*":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["applicationInfo","items","number","state","totalPrice"],"properties":{"applicationInfo":{"type":"object","required":["id","state"],"properties":{"id":{"type":"string","description":"Unique identifier in HCO"},"state":{"type":"string","description":"Application state.","enum":["CANCELLED","PROCESSING","READY","REJECTED"]},"stateReason":{"type":"string","description":"Describes internal state of application, e.g. when state is PROCESSING - reason why application remains in processing state","enum":["CANCELLED_NOT_PAID","CANCELLED_RETURNED","CANCELLED_TO_RETURN","PROCESSING_ADDITIONAL_DATA","PROCESSING_ALT_OFFER","PROCESSING_APPROVED","PROCESSING_NEW","PROCESSING_PREAPPROVED","PROCESSING_REDIRECT_NEEDED","PROCESSING_REVIEW","PROCESSING_SIGNED","PROCESSING_VALIDATION_IN_PROGRESS","PROCESSING_VERIFICATION","READY_DELIVERED","READY_DELIVERING","READY_PAID","READY_SHIPPED","READY_TO_SHIP","REJECTED"]}},"title":"FinancingV1ApplicationBase"},"deliveryDate":{"type":"string","format":"date","description":"date and time of delivery"},"deliveryTrackingNumber":{"type":"string","description":"delivery tracking number"},"deliveryType":{"type":"string","description":"delivery type, for `DELIVERY_CARRIER` type can be further specified by DeliveryCarrier attribute.Typ doruceni. Dopravcem, osobni prevzeti, online doruceni atd.","enum":["DELIVERY_CARRIER","ONLINE","PERSONAL_BRANCH","PERSONAL_BRANCH_WITH_ASSISTANCE","PERSONAL_PARTNER"]},"items":{"type":"array","description":"order items","items":{"type":"object","required":["name","state","totalPrice"],"properties":{"code":{"type":"string","description":"internal code for item (internal to e-shop). Used to better identify the item for future changes","minLength":0,"maxLength":100},"deliveryDate":{"type":"string","format":"date","description":"date when item was delivered. Only when the whole order was NOT sent at once."},"deliveryTrackingNumber":{"type":"string","description":"Tracking number for the item. Only when the whole order was NOT sent at once."},"ean":{"type":"string","description":"EAN code","minLength":0,"maxLength":32},"image":{"type":"object","properties":{"content":{"type":"string","description":"File content (Base64 encoded, maximum size of encoded string is 500kB)"},"filename":{"type":"string","description":"file name"},"url":{"type":"string","description":"File URL"}},"title":"FinancingFile"},"name":{"type":"string","description":"item name"},"producer":{"type":"string"},"quantity":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"Item quantity"},"sentDate":{"type":"string","format":"date","description":"date when item was sent. Only when the whole order was NOT sent at once."},"state":{"type":"string","enum":["CANCELLED","DELIVERED","PROCESSING","RETURNED","SENT"]},"totalPrice":{"type":"object","required":["amount","currency"],"properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in decimal format"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency. ISO 4217"}},"title":"FinancingV1Amount"},"type":{"type":"string","description":"item type","enum":["DIGITAL","DISCOUNT","FEE","GIFT_CARD","INSURANCE","PHYSICAL","SALES_TAX","SHIPPING_FEE","STORE_CREDIT"]},"unitPrice":{"type":"object","required":["amount","currency"],"properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in decimal format"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency. ISO 4217"}},"title":"FinancingV1Amount"}},"title":"FinancingV1OrderItem"}},"number":{"type":"string","description":"order number (internal for e-shop)"},"reservationDate":{"type":"string","format":"date-time","description":"Date and time until order is reserved. After this date, e-shop does not guarantee items availability (if application processing is longer, it may endanger order fullfillment)."},"sentDate":{"type":"string","format":"date","description":"date and time of order shipping"},"state":{"type":"string","description":"Order state","enum":["CANCELLED","DELIVERED","PROCESSING","RETURNED","SENT"]},"totalPrice":{"type":"object","required":["amount","currency"],"properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in decimal format"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency. ISO 4217"}},"title":"FinancingV1Amount"},"variableSymbols":{"type":"array","description":"variable symbols (internal for e-shop)","items":{"type":"string"}}},"title":"FinancingV1OrderExtended"}}}},"201":{"description":"Created"},"401":{"description":"Unauthorized"},"403":{"description":"Forbidden"},"404":{"description":"Not Found"}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
